---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
classes: page-about
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<div class="about-wrapper">

  <section class="about-hero">
    <div class="about-photo-container">
      <img src="images/profile.png" alt="Manoj Kumar" class="about-photo">
    </div>
    <div class="about-bio">
      <h1>Bridging the gap between complex data and strategic business value.</h1>
      <p>I am a Data Science and Digital Transformation leader specializing in deploying AI systems, building predictive models, and engineering ESG analytics for enterprise-scale operations. My focus is on turning raw industrial and business data into measurable operational efficiency.</p>
      
      <a href="#" id="secure-contact" class="btn">Get in Touch</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/imanojkumar" target="_blank" class="btn" style="margin-left: 10px;">LinkedIn</a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="bento-grid">

    <div class="bento-card span-2-col wide-tablet">
      <div class="bento-label">Philosophy</div>
      <h3>Data is only as valuable as the decisions it drives.</h3>
      <p>Whether forecasting sugarcane production, optimizing predictive maintenance for heavy mining equipment, or engineering real-time ESG compliance pipelines, my approach remains the same: build robust, scalable machine learning frameworks that directly address core business pain points and generate measurable ROI.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="bento-card span-2-row">
      <div class="bento-label">Education</div>
      <h3>Academic Foundation</h3>
      <p style="margin-bottom: 20px;"><strong>Ph.D. / Master's Degree</strong><br>University Name<br><span style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);">Year - Year</span></p>
      <p style="margin-bottom: 20px;"><strong>Bachelor's Degree</strong><br>University Name<br><span style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted);">Year - Year</span></p>
      <div style="margin-top: auto;">
        <div class="bento-label" style="margin-bottom: 8px;">Key Certifications</div>
        <p style="font-size: 13px; margin:0;">• AWS Certified Machine Learning</p>
        <p style="font-size: 13px; margin:0;">• Enterprise Architecture Frameworks</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bento-card">
      <div class="bento-label">Expertise</div>
      <h3>Core Domains</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Time-Series Forecasting</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Digital Transformation</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">ESG Analytics</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">IoT Pipelines</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bento-card">
      <div class="bento-label">Tech Stack</div>
      <h3>Primary Tools</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">TensorFlow/PyTorch</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">AWS / Azure</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Quarto</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bento-card span-2-col wide-tablet" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--surface) 0%, rgba(0, 102, 255, 0.05) 100%);">
      <div class="bento-label">Impact</div>
      <h3>By the Numbers</h3>
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-box">
          <div class="stat-num">15+</div>
          <div class="stat-text">Years of Experience</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <div class="stat-num">17</div>
          <div class="stat-text">Publications & Cases</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <div class="stat-num">4+</div>
          <div class="stat-text">Enterprise Rollouts</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <div class="stat-num">30%</div>
          <div class="stat-text">Downtime Reduction (Avg)</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="bento-card">
      <div class="bento-label">Current Role</div>
      <h3>Leading the Charge</h3>
      <p>Currently, I serve as General Manager - IT at Hindalco Industries Limited, where I head Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, MIS, ESG and other Strategic transformational initiatives.</p>
    </div>

  </section>
</div>

```
